headlines.headline: UK PM Keir Starmer faces mounting pressure to resign as 70+ Labour MPs call for his departure
headlines.summary: Home Secretary Shabana Mahmood among ministers calling for Starmer to set out a timetable for resignation following heavy election losses. Three ministers have already resigned.

headlines.headline: Trump and Xi meet in high-stakes China summit amid Iran war tensions
headlines.summary: The leaders are expected to discuss trade, artificial intelligence, export controls, Taiwan, and the ongoing Iran war. Trump invited CEOs including Elon Musk and Tim Cook to join the trip.

headlines.headline: Oil prices surge above $100 as Strait of Hormuz remains shut due to Iran war
headlines.summary: Brent crude rose to around $105 per barrel. The key waterway has been effectively closed since February 28, disrupting 20% of global oil supplies and causing US inflation to jump to 3.8%.

headlines.headline: UN confirms 269 killed in Pakistani airstrike on Kabul rehab centre, calls grow for war crime investigation
headlines.summary: A UN report confirmed the death toll from the March 16 strike on the Omid Drug Rehabilitation Hospital, acknowledging the real figure is likely significantly higher.

headlines.headline: Hantavirus outbreak on cruise ship grows to 11 cases as passengers evacuated from Canary Islands
headlines.summary: More than 90 passengers of the MV Hondius have been repatriated via military and government flights. Spain confirmed a new case in an evacuated passenger.

headlines.headline: Venezuela rejects Trump's '51st state' remarks; acting president defends territory
headlines.summary: Acting President Delcy Rodríguez firmly rejected the notion of Venezuela becoming a U.S. state after Trump said he was 'seriously considering' such a move.

headlines.headline: Southern California mayor resigns after being accused of acting as Chinese government agent
headlines.summary: The mayor will plead guilty to charges related to acting as an agent for the Chinese government, according to AP reports.

headlines.headline: BBC investigation unmasks key people smuggler behind most small boat crossings to UK
headlines.summary: The 28-year-old Iraqi Kurd operates under the alias 'Kardo Ranya' and has evaded arrest while orchestrating smuggling networks.
